sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42771" key="e)ruqro/canqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρυθρό-ξανθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n42771.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reddish-yellow</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
